TimeEntry.Title: Your veeam license has been expired on BST-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: During the Veeam backup check, I noticed that the VSPC portal was showing a warning that the Veeam license had expired. To resolve this, I connected to the BST-HQ-VBR-01 server and verified that the license was running in the grace period. I then logged into the Veeam Pulse portal, updated the license expiry date to the end of March, downloaded the required license file, and initiated the installation process. Once the installation was completed, I restarted the VSPC agent service on the server and verified that the updated license is now visible on the VSPC portal.

TimeEntry.Title: BST_HQ_VONE Probe is down.
TimeEntry.Notes: While logging into the OPS Manager admin console, found that the BST probe was down. Logged into the server to check whether the probe was installed, the SNMP service was running, and the community string was added. The probe service was stopped, so restarted the service. After that, refreshed the probe from the portal, and it is now showing as online. Closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.96 on BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-AD-02,BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.82. Connected to the machines BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-AD-02,BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-FS-01 from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.96. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage Engine agent upgraded to the latest version 11.4.2528.28 on BST Servers
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28 W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (  BST-HQ-AD-01, BST-HQ-AD-02, BST-HQ-FS-01, BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-RA-01, BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-VBR-01, BST-HQ-VONE), Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - BST-HQ-FS-02 & BST-HQ-RA-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BST-HQ-FS-02 & BST-HQ-RA-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall Backup – BST
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary

Performed the weekly firewall backup for BST. Logged in to the firewall, downloaded the latest configuration backup file, and uploaded the backup to the Teams channel for recordkeeping and reference. Verified that the backup completed successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - BST-HQ-AD-01, BST-HQ-AD-02, BST-HQ-FS-01, BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-RA-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

BST-HQ-AD-01, BST-HQ-AD-02, BST-HQ-FS-01, BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-RA-01

TimeEntry.Title: BST Monthly FortiSwitch Switch Backup
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall and accessed the connected switch to perform the monthly switch configuration backup. Successfully took the backup and shared/uploaded the backup file in the team channel for record and verification..

TimeEntry.Title: BST Monthly zzz FortiSwitch Switch Backup
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in the firewall and accessed the connected switch to perform the monthly switch configuration backup. Successfully took the backup and shared/uploaded the backup file in the team channel for record and verification.

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version 11.4.2528.28.W updated:- BST-HQ-FS-01 and BST-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (BST-HQ-FS-01 and  BST-HQ-VBR-01) from Manage Engine, Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Backup location [\\10.1.1.195\BK_BST] is getting low on free disk space (242.5 GB free of 3.5 TB).
TimeEntry.Notes: Monitor the Veeam backups for BST and found backups were completed with warning alerts due to low space in the backup storage. To resolve this, I cleaned up the old backups that were older than 14 days and then rescanned the repository. After this backup space has increased 242 GB to 2.4 TB. Now it has sufficient space to complete the backups without warnings.

TimeEntry.Title: BST – Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: Network Detective report was generated successfully. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for BST. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Email Boston Group
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received email on support from Jeff regarding email issue for all the users. We investigated the Microsoft 365 service issue impacting all user mailboxes and confirmed a tenant-level Exchange Online access block (TenantAccessBlockedException). During review of the Microsoft 365 Admin Center and billing information, we found that the Office 365 E1 and E3 subscriptions expired on December 6, 2025, and the grace period has also ended, which resulted in Microsoft restricting Exchange Online access for the tenant.

We verified that the tenant itself remains active, identity services are functioning normally, and no mailbox or tenant deletion has occurred. Mailbox data is retained and will be restored once valid licenses are reactivated.

The billing department has been contacted, and they are currently moving the tenant’s licensing from Ingram Micro to Pax8. This transition will allow new Microsoft 365 / Exchange Online licenses to be provisioned and assigned. Once the licenses are active, Exchange Online access will be automatically restored.

We are monitoring the license transition and will validate mailbox access and mail flow as soon as the Pax8 licenses are applied.

TimeEntry.Title: Gagan Email Issue : on call
TimeEntry.Notes: Gagan was experiencing issues with sending and receiving emails. I logged into his system, reconfigured Outlook, and signed out and back into the account to refresh authentication. After reconfiguration, email functionality was restored. I later followed up with Gagan over the phone and guided him through the steps taken, confirming that email was working correctly and ensuring he understood how to proceed if the issue reoccurs.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Email Boston Group
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked with shaundra on O365 license for BST from Pax8 and configured the setting and assigned the licenses to all the users.

TimeEntry.Title: QNAP firmware 5.2.8.3359 upgrade for BST
TimeEntry.Notes: I logged into the QNAP system in the BST environment and found that firmware updates were pending. Before proceeding with the update, I verified that all backup jobs had completed successfully. Since a reboot was required prior to installing the firmware, I rebooted the QNAP device, installed the updates, and then performed a second reboot to finalise the installation. After the system came back online, I verified that all shared folders were accessible. I then re-scanned the backup repository, and the scan completed successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: dekstop set up
TimeEntry.Notes: Jeff dropped laptop, Set up the desktop to use in mexico. install all the applications.

TimeEntry.Title: New laptop and email
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the handover need to install the technijian security tools.

Connect to the new system and rename the system Bst-hq-lpt-02.

Install all the technijian tools and also verified the system on all the portals.....

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage Engine agent upgraded to the latest version 11.4.2528.28 on BST Servers
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28 W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-FS-01, BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-RA-01), Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: New laptop and email
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary:

Title: Application Installation and Configuration for BST-HQ-LPT-02

Description:
As per the handover instructions, I connected to BST-HQ-LPT-02 and completed the following tasks:

  • Installed the required applications.

  • Applied system updates to ensure the machine is up to date.

  • Configured and tested VPN connectivity.

  • Added the resource folder for easy access.

  • Set up Outlook and OneDrive for the user.

  • Installed other required applications as per the setup instructions.

Status: Completed
Next Steps:

  • Verify all applications are functioning as expected.

  • Monitor for any issues and follow up if necessary.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machine BST-HQ-LPT-02,BG77, BG72, KEVIN2
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then scan the machine for installed patches.

After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully and machine are in healthy state.

 

Machine : BST-HQ-LPT-02,BG77, BG72, KEVIN2

Patch installed:

Patch ID Patch Name

1318984 Ethernet Connection (5) I219-LM[PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_15E3] (12.19.2.65)

1318986 Ethernet Connection (17) I219-LM[PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_1A1C] (12.19.2.65)

1318782 Wireless-AC 9560[PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_7AF0] (23.170.0.1)

1318025 High Definition Audio[HDAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_1002&DEV_AA01] (10.0.1.41)

1317027 RTL8852BE-VT PCIe 802.11ax Wireless Network Controller[PCI\VEN_10EC&DEV_B520] (6101.19.1260.600)

1316412 Realtek High Definition Audio[HDAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0236] (6.0.9815.1)

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version 11.4.2528.28.W updated:- BST-HQ-AD-01, BST-HQ-VONE, BST-HQ-RA-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (BST-HQ-AD-01, BST-HQ-VONE, BST-HQ-RA-01)Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Firewall : Weekly backup (JAN-2026)
TimeEntry.Notes: The backup has been taken and uploaded to the BST Teams channel under the Backup folder.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version 11.4.2528.28.W updated:- BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-FS-02
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2528.28.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine (BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-FS-02)Tried to update the version but got an error (old version is already installed on it) so removed the earlier installed version. Downloaded and installed the new version after verifying the same from the portal, Devices are up to date with the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent Upgrade and Verification
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary:
Identified outdated Huntress Agent version v0.14.82 on systems BG72, BG77, BST-HQ-LPT-01, and BST-HQ-RA-01 via the Huntress portal. Connected to the machines using ManageEngine, downloaded, and installed the latest Huntress Agent version v0.14.96. Verified in the Huntress portal that all listed systems are now updated to the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.96 on BST-HQ-VONE,BST-HQ-VBR-01,BST-HQ-RG-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on  is old version V0.14.82. Connected to the machines
BST-HQ-VONE,BST-HQ-VBR-01,BST-HQ-RG-01 from manage engine, download and installed the latest version Ver0.14.96. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: New laptop and email
TimeEntry.Notes: After verifying that all required tools and applications are installed and confirming, the ticket has been closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - BST-HQ-APP-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BST-HQ-APP-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - BST-HQ-RG-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BST-HQ-RG-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Help
TimeEntry.Notes: Received email on support from Jeff for having issue with VPN, so connected to his  laptop and setup the VPN configuration. After that user was able to connect to VPN and able to access remote apps. Then user again email for having issue to Cietrade . So connected to his machine, cietrade was giving error that it is opened on other machine. SO I connected to RA server and killed the Cietrade session. Now cietrade is opening but not showing on screen. So as suggested by Jeff to connect to his home machine and drag the cietrade to home screen. SO connected to his home machine, open cietrade and drag to home screen. After that Jeff was able to see cietrade screen on his lenovo laptop as confirmed by him.

TimeEntry.Title: Jeff VPN issue
TimeEntry.Notes: Jeff VPN was not working on laptop, Jeff home desktop ce-trade application not opening. Worked with Satish.

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade Veeam one version to latest version.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Veeam One server and then go to web and download version 13 for Veeam one in BST-HQ-VONE-01. After that start installing the latest version on the server but it was having some issue. Troubleshoot the issue and then go through the error. After that remove the existing version from the server and then start installing the Veeam ONE latest version on the VONE server. Once the version has been upgraded then go to the web and setup all alarms.

TimeEntry.Title: Server BST-HQ-VBR-01 pending for reboot after APD & failed updates.
TimeEntry.Notes:
1. Connected to the RMM System & find the updates failed.

2. Connected to the server, find the restart was also pending. Restarted the server.

3. Again connected with the server, updated the failed & the pending updates. Restarted the server once again and started the required services.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.33.20504.0)updated on machines BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-FS-01,BST-HQ-OPSPRB-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-AD-02,BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-FS-01,BST-HQ-OPSPRB-01
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.33.20504.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: BST- CrowdStrike Sensor Update
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary: CrowdStrike Sensor Update

Logged into the CrowdStrike portal to review machines running outdated sensor versions. Identified the following systems with older versions installed:

  • BST-HQ-RA-01

  • BST-HQ-RG-01

  • BST-HQ-VBR-01

  • BST-HQ-VONE

Connected to each affected machine, uninstalled the existing CrowdStrike sensor, and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version (7.33.20504.0). Verified via the CrowdStrike portal that all listed machines are now running the updated version.

Status: Resolved – ticket closed

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version updated 7.33.20504.0 on BG75 & BG21
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that  Crowdstrike latest version updated BG75 & BG21 needed updates. I updated both to version 7.33.20504.0

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Help
TimeEntry.Notes:
Connected to Jeff Klein’s home computer via remote session after receiving user consent. Investigated the issue where the Remote Desktop folder was missing. The issue was successfully identified and resolved during the remote session.User confirmed that the Remote Desktop folder is now restored and working as expected.
No further issues reported at this time.

TimeEntry.Title: Found BG77 pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes: Identified machines pending reboot following patch installation. Logged into the machines and performed a reboot. Verified all required services were running successfully post-restart and completed a scan to confirm system health. No further issues observed.

TimeEntry.Title: Server updates pending and pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login in manage engine portal and checked  machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.

After restarting worked on the pending updates, and restarted the server for the required one.

TimeEntry.Title: Server BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-RA-01,BST-HQ-FS-01,BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-FS-02,BST-HQ-AD-02 pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login in manage engine portal and checked machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.

After reboot login into the server, and checked required services are running. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machines for installed patches in APD. After scan the machines are now in healthy systems.

Machine : BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-RA-01,BST-HQ-FS-01,BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-FS-02,BST-HQ-AD-02

TimeEntry.Title: Screenshot 2026-01-19 at 8.12.25 AM
TimeEntry.Notes: Asked Jeff to confirm where he is attempting to access his account from. Provided troubleshooting steps including using the Microsoft login URL directly, signing in via a private/incognito browser session, trying a different browser, and avoiding old or saved Microsoft login bookmarks. Advised to contact support if the issue persists.Waiting for user response.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenshot 2026-01-19 at 8.12.25 AM
TimeEntry.Notes: Later, we received an email from Jeff stating that none of the provided instructions were working. I tested the same steps from my end and confirmed that Microsoft sign-in was working successfully on the web. Jeff then requested the Microsoft credentials that were confirmed to be working, which I provided. I also instructed him to uninstall the Microsoft Teams app, reinstall it, and sign back in. Since then, we have not received any further updates from Jeff. Client confirmation or follow-up email is still pending.

TimeEntry.Title: BST – Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: Setup the BST Network Detective automation setup. Then Network Detective report was generated successfully. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for BST. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenshot 2026-01-19 at 8.12.25 AM
TimeEntry.Notes: Jeff reported that the Microsoft Teams app was still not working. To isolate the issue, I removed my own account from my Android phone and successfully signed in using Jeff’s account, confirming the account itself was working. I shared the credentials with Jeff. He then requested Claudia’s credentials, which were not available, so I contacted Claudia and obtained approval to reset her password. I reset Claudia’s password via Microsoft 365 Admin Center and securely shared it with Jeff via SMS. I also provided step-by-step Teams troubleshooting instructions, including reinstalling the app, clearing Safari data, signing in via portal.office.com, completing MFA, and verifying device settings. Later confirmation showed Teams was working successfully for both Jeff and Claudia.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-FS-02,BST-HQ-VONE,BST-HQ-OPSPRB-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Review the Manage Engine portal and found BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-FS-02,BST-HQ-VONE,BST-HQ-OPSPRB-01 machine showing offline in Manage Engine Portal 
and were having grey out status. So connected to the machines. Checked and restart the Manage Engine services.
But nothing happened. So removed the agent  and installed the updated version (11.4.2528.28.W) in the machine.
 After that refresh the manage engine portal. Now the machines are showing online. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Server BST-HQ-VBR-01,BST-HQ-OPSPRB-01,BST-HQ-FS-01,BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-AD-02 pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login in manage engine portal and checked machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.

After reboot login into the server, and checked required services are running. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machines for installed patches in APD. After scan the machines are now in healthy systems.

Machine : BST-HQ-VBR-01,BST-HQ-OPSPRB-01,BST-HQ-FS-01,BST-HQ-AD-01,BST-HQ-AD-02

TimeEntry.Title: Server BST-HQ-RA-01,BST-HQ-RG-01 pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login in manage engine portal and checked machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.

After reboot login into the server, and checked required services are running. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machines for installed patches in APD. After scan the machines are now in healthy systems.

Machine : BST-HQ-RA-01,BST-HQ-RG-01

TimeEntry.Title: Server BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-FS-02, BST-HQ-VONE pending for reboot after APD
TimeEntry.Notes: Login in manage engine portal and checked machines . Found below mentioned server pending for reboot after APD. So login into the servers, and restart the server.After reboot login into the server, and checked required services are running. Then login again in manage engine portal and scan the machines for installed patches in APD. After scan the machines are now in healthy systems.Machine :  BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-FS-02, BST-HQ-VONE

TimeEntry.Title: ManageEngine Agent Syncing Issue with the Portal on :-BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-RG-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines BST-HQ-OPSPRB-0, BST-HQ-RG-01 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Firewall Configuration backup has been done.
TimeEntry.Notes: Firewall Configuration backup has been done for BST.

TimeEntry.Title: System pending for updates after APD
TimeEntry.Notes:
For BST Client

 

1. Worked on the  ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches  for the below mentioned machine then download and installed the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer.

2.After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully and machine are in healthy state.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Work computer locked
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the email, logged into the AD server to check the user account and found that the account was disabled. I enabled/unlocked the account and updated the group policy. After that, I replied to the client. The issue is now resolved and confirmed working by the user.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote stuck on the BST-HQ-APP-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to my remote session and observed that the screen was freezing while attempting to log in to the server. Accessed the server via MyRMM and checked the ScreenConnect service. Restarted the service and verified the functionality. The issue is now resolved, and the ticket is being closed

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - BST-HQ-AD-02
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BST-HQ-AD-02 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Critical LAN Alert Resolved – BST-HQ-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to the Ops Manager portal and verified that server BST-HQ-AD-01 was showing a critical LAN alert. Reviewed all related settings, cleared all pending alerts, and rediscovered the server. Verified that the server status is now showing up correctly. Issue resolved and ticket closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - BST-HQ-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server BST-HQ-FS-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP-QPBGLP8 : Critical low space found (need immediate cleanup)
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machine and performed standard cleanup procedures (cleared temporary files, removed old patches, deleted crash dumps, and removed .exe files from the Downloads folder), increasing the available disk space to 9 GB.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote
